Shield of the Freezing Winds  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 28
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +5 HP: +60
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Shield of the Freezing Winds
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 28
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +5 HP: +60
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Hoss
Lucy Entry By:Sol
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-19 03:13:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Velketor the Sorcerer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth

it is a good shield

__DEL__1593965965008
104 posts
i have this shield now..and for the hit points and ac i like it...but when i need resists i trade it out for the sarnak shield
also this shield kinda looks cool....
the pointy blue shields with a emblem on them
if that makes any sense
Ironking
59th pally
the rathe server

# Jan 09 2001 at 2:50 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
It does seem a little low for the encounter and yet again it has a name that seems to ahve nothing to do with the item, maybe it has a cool wintery picture on it :)

Sounds like a good effect for this item would be a cold based damage sheild like the necro/sk damage sheild.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 09 2001 at 7:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) once again Verant had potential and blew it.. sorry i will still use my sarnak shield that is a uncommon from yard trsh in chardok and is still better than naggy shield lol !!! oh well.. someday they will learn
hmm
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2001 at 2:23 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
shure this shield looks nice , but for a lev66 mob its a little bit crappy .
If you compare it to the sarnak battle shield it has AC+3 HP+20 more
but you loose STR+5 fire cold magic+10 .
And its a heavy thing too :(

# Jan 09 2001 at 5:25 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245814955
37 posts
Velk is only 63-65, since he is always red to 60s and can be casted on.

RE: hmm
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2001 at 2:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245801683
Scholar
32 posts
Well, technically, a level 66 mob could still be casted on by level 60s. There is a 7 level max difference for spells to be casted (and not resisted).
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 14 2002 at 1:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well technically you dont know what your talking about, however, thanks for your time.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 09 2001 at 9:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Seems like this needs an effect like freezing winds,duh. (maybe a 75point dd cold based spell?) that would make it a little more risk vs reward friendly.

# Jul 16 2001 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361589088
8 posts
I don't know how but when i wear this shield it adds 44 ac. even when the stats reads 28 ac 5sta hp 60. does that mean that if you add 5sta you get 16ac? I better take a closer look. BTW I like this shield better than the sarnak battle trash cause this is the one i have =) HP items helps if you are a cleric. Wish it had an effect like a righ clickable/stackable with anything +50CR that you can cast on others. It would not be good for a melee though against the Sarnak Battle Shield because of the STR loss. I double checked and it does give me 44 ac.
▲ Page top
RE: hmm
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2001 at 8:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750388498
100 posts
Your defense skill adds a % to the ac of armor. That's why 18 ac on a piece of armor is better than 18 ac on a spell. I think the formula is defense skill divided by 4 or 5 and added in % but I'm not sure.

▲ Page top
